StakeVault
Staking Pools Rewards How It Works FAQ
Staking Pools Rewards How It Works FAQ
Passive Income

Earn Crypto
While You Hold

Stake your cryptocurrency on StakeVault and earn attractive APY returns. Low risk, high rewards. Stake Bitcoin, Ethereum, Polkadot, and 50+ other cryptocurrencies instantly.

$45.2B

Total Staked

850K+

Active Stakers

Premium Staking Pools

High-yield opportunities across major cryptocurrencies

APY 4.5%

Bitcoin

Secure and proven network

Min Stake: 0.001 BTC
Lock Period: 30 days
Pooled Value: $12.5B
APY 6.8%

Ethereum

Staking through Proof of Stake

Min Stake: 0.1 ETH
Lock Period: Flexible
Pooled Value: $18.2B
APY 8.2%

Polkadot

High-yield nomination pool

Min Stake: 10 DOT
Lock Period: 14 days
Pooled Value: $8.9B
APY 7.1%

Chainlink

Oracle network staking rewards

Min Stake: 1 LINK
Lock Period: 7 days
Pooled Value: $5.3B
APY 9.5%

Cardano

Delegated proof of stake

Min Stake: 1 ADA
Lock Period: Flexible
Pooled Value: $7.1B
APY 6.2%

Solana

High-performance validator rewards

Min Stake: 0.01 SOL
Lock Period: Flexible
Pooled Value: $3.2B

Your Staking Rewards

Real-time earnings tracking and automated compounding

Today's Earnings

$247.83

APY: 6.8% on $13.2K staked

Monthly Earnings

$7,434

Projected annual: $89K+

Total Earned (Lifetime)

$1,248.92

Since you started staking

How Staking Works

1

Connect Wallet

Link your crypto wallet securely to StakeVault using Web3 authentication.

2

Select Assets

Choose which cryptocurrencies you want to stake from our curated pools.

3

Deposit & Earn

Deposit your crypto and immediately start earning rewards automatically.

4

Withdraw Anytime

Unlock your tokens anytime with flexible unstaking (lock period varies).

Frequently Asked Questions

Yes, StakeVault uses industry-leading security measures. All funds are held in secure smart contracts that are regularly audited. We've never had a security incident since launch.
For most pools, you can unstake anytime. However, some pools have lock periods (Bitcoin: 30 days, Polkadot: 14 days). Unstaking is always free with no penalties.
Rewards are calculated daily and credited directly to your staking pool. You can compound your earnings or withdraw them anytime. APY is fixed for the duration of your stake.
We charge only a 5% commission on rewards earned (not your principal). No withdrawal fees, no deposit fees, no hidden charges. Transparent pricing always.

Start Earning Passive Income Today

Join 850K+ stakers earning real yields on their crypto holdings
